/usr/bin/clang++-20 -g CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/config/ConfigManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/network/HttpServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/network/WebSocketServer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/engine/BidEngine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/engine/TimingWheel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/engine/AntiSnipe.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/service/UserService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/service/ItemService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/service/AuctionService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/service/OrderService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/service/PaymentService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/db/MySQLPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/db/RedisPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/cache/DoubleBuffer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/model/User.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/model/Item.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/model/Bid.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/model/Order.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/util/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/auction_server.dir/src/util/JwtHelper.cpp.o -o bin/auction_server  -Wl,-rpath,/home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib lib/libdrogon.a lib/libhiredisd.a /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libfmt.so.12.1.0 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libmysqlclient.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so lib/libtrantor.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so -lpthread -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libjsoncpp.so /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libyaml-cpp.so.0.9.0 /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libuuid.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libhiredis.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so /home/linuxbrew/.linuxbrew/lib/libyaml-cpp.so.0.9.0
